idea-plugin.name: Esprito Spring Tools
idea-plugin.description:
Esprito Spring Tools: Elevate Your Spring Boot Projects

Esprito Spring Tools is the IntelliJ IDEA plugin that simplifies your workflow with Spring Boot. Key features include:

  • Swift Autocompletion: Seamlessly autocomplete bean names and navigate through annotations with class and file references.
  • Configuration Simplified: Effortlessly complete and navigate properties in both .properties and .yaml files.
  • Intelligent Code Navigation: Instantly visualize connections within your Spring architecture.
  • Proactive Inspections: Prevent common issues with insightful checks on your Spring configuration and annotations.
  • JPQL Proficiency: Harness the power of JPQL with integrated syntax highlighting and advanced navigation.
  • Spring Profile Management: Directly manage and search for Spring profiles within your configuration files.

With Esprito Spring Tools, dodge the common traps and speed up your coding with a tool that's built to boost productivity.

Get Esprito Spring Tools now and transform the way you build Spring Boot applications.
